creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Thank you for your continued contributions to FreeBSD. 
Could you look at a couple of issues and get back to me about them? 
Two issues, #1, a question,  you are installing this in /usr/local/bounceHammer (bin/etc/lib/share/var/ etc? 
this isn't all that standard, and you can't use ETCDIR/SHAREDIR/LIBDIR/ build in sub/make and plist vars 
putting all this, (read only, configs, examples, docs, db, ./var/run) into $PREFIX can, and will cause problems with other  
users who rely on certain standard behaviours. 

If you do this, you can use built in PLIST_SUB vars for pkg-plist (at $ prompt, type "make -V PLIST_SUB" for what you can  
use inside of pkg-plist, and make -V SUB_LIST for standard prefix's and file locations.  
(and, use /var/run/bounceHammer, and /var/db/bounceHammer for those) 

If you need help on this, subscribe to ports@ mailing list and ask there. 

#2, please run portlint -abt before resubmitting shar.  Please fix the FATAL errors, and any WARN's that make sense.
